resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
job_details:
About the job
Transform. Innovate. Build the next generation of RegTech.

Our client, a leading SaaS RegTech provider, is seeking an experienced Lead Software Engineer to drive technical leadership across a high-impact, enterprise-grade platform. This is a hands-on leadership role where you will shape architecture, guide engineering standards, and build scalable, secure solutions in a highly regulated environment.

You’ll partner closely with Product, Operations, Compliance, and commercial stakeholders to evolve the platform and deliver outcomes that matter to enterprise clients.

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Technical Leadership & Architecture
Define and evolve the platform architecture across a cloud-native, event-driven ecosystem. Set the technical vision and lead from the front.

Full-Stack Delivery
Operate across the stack, from React front-end experiences to Java/Spring Boot APIs and backend services, ensuring scalable, maintainable solutions.

Cloud-Native Engineering
Design, deploy, and operate workloads in AWS using containerised and serverless patterns.

Engineering Excellence
Mentor engineers, uplift standards, embed DevOps best practice, and drive high-quality, automated delivery.

Strategic Collaboration
Work cross-functionally to balance technical excellence with commercial and regulatory outcomes.

ABOUT YOU

You are a hands-on leader who is comfortable building and operating modern cloud platforms with proven experience leading engineers in enterprise SaaS environments.

You'll also bring:

Proven experience leading engineers in enterprise SaaS environments
Strong architectural capability across cloud-native platforms
Demonstrated full-stack capability — not siloed to one layer
Experience in RegTech, FinTech or other regulated industries
Commercial awareness and ability to balance speed, scale and compliance
Strong mentoring capability and clear technical communication

Core Engineering Stack

Java (Java 21+) & Spring Boot
SQL & PostgreSQL
Python
React & Node.js
RESTful API design and integration-heavy environments

Cloud & Infrastructure (AWS)

Production experience designing, deploying and operating:

EKS / Kubernetes
Lambda
RDS (PostgreSQL)
DynamoDB
S3
Containerisation with Docker
CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline/CodeBuild or equivalent)

This role requires hands-on operational confidence , not just consuming services, but deploying, configuring and running them in production.

Architecture & Platform Patterns

Event-driven systems (SQS, SNS, EventBridge or similar)
API Gateway and integration patterns
Microservices and distributed systems
DevOps and automated release management


WHY THIS ROLE?

This is an opportunity to shape a transformational RegTech platform at scale. You’ll influence architecture, drive innovation, and deliver meaningful impact for enterprise clients.

If you’re a hands-on technical leader who thrives in complex, cloud-native environments we’d love to hear from you.

TO APPLY

If this role sounds right for you, APPLY NOW by submitting your CV.
prompt:
Answer these employer screening questions professionally and honestly based on the provided resume.
For multiple choice questions, select the most appropriate option that matches the candidate's experience.
For text questions, provide clear, concise answers (1-2 sentences).
Be truthful - if the candidate doesn't have a specific qualification, indicate that politely while highlighting related experience.
